candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets; inferior to explicit total.
Non-current assets balancing item, not current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet cash line; exact match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile to balance sheet cash, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash is not the target balance sheet stock for the year-end CHE variable.
Non-cash adjustment line, unrelated to cash balance.
Non-cash adjustment line, unrelated to cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line rather than cash flow statement period-end cash.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; exact match for LCT.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/subcomponent line, not total current liabilities.
Balancing item, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities/provisions, not current liabilities.
Non-current balancing line, not current liabilities total.
Non-current balancing item, not current liabilities total.
Total non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for current financing debt; includes current borrowings/interest-bearing liabilities. Prefer this over components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Captures current portion of long-term debt, but appears to be a component of the broader current interest-bearing liabilities total.
Current financing debt component, but likely included within current interest-bearing liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clean reported total for short-term interest-bearing debt. Excludes lease rows per rule and avoids double counting components such as overdrafts and current maturities.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct current tax liability line selected.

candidates.why: Under IFRS, tangible assets corresponds to property, plant and equipment; best balance sheet total/net PPE line.
Cash flow investing line, not a balance sheet PPE stock variable.
Cash flow disposal line, not PPE balance.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangible asset component, not PPE.
Intangible contra-asset, not PPE.
Balancing line for intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Indefinite-lived Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill) - Net - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental intangible disclosure, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Realized G/L on Fixed Assets (PPE & Intangibles)
candidates.why: Income/cash flow adjustment, not PPE balance.
Cash flow investing line, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Used the reported balance sheet total tangible assets line as the best proxy for net PPE.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; exact match for AT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line selected.
